channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PSTITANIA] Propshare Titania Board to Consider Q4 FY26 Results & Unitholder Distributions
item.description:
The Investment Manager of Property Share Investment Trust and its second scheme, PropShare Titania, has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for Friday, April 17, 2026. The primary agenda includes considering and approving the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will review and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial statements for the year ended March 31, 2026. A key item for consideration is also the declaration of distributions to the unitholders of PropShare Titania for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This meeting is crucial for investors awaiting the REIT's financial performance and potential payouts.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 17, 2026.
  • To consider Q4 and full-year FY26 audited financial results.
  • Also to approve audited financial statements for FY26.
  • Declaration of unitholder distributions for Q4 FY26 on agenda.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Propshare Titania SM REIT - IPO (Second scheme of the Property Share Investment Trust) | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PSPLATINA] Propshare Platina Board to Consider Q4/FY26 Results & Distributions
item.description:
The Board of Directors of PropShare Investment Manager Private Limited, the Investment Manager for Property Share Investment Trust and its first scheme, PropShare Platina, will convene on Friday, April 17, 2026. The meeting's agenda includes the consideration and potential approval of the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and fiscal year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will review and approve the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Statements for the year ended March 31, 2026. A key item on the agenda is also the declaration of distributions to the unitholders of PropShare Platina for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 17, 2026.
  • To consider Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Also to approve full year financial statements.
  • Declaration of Q4 FY26 distributions to unitholders.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Property Share Investment Trust - Propshare Platina | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BLUEDART] Blue Dart: Prakash Apte resigns as Chairman & Independent Director
item.description:
Mr. Prakash Apte, Chairman and Independent Director of Blue Dart Express Ltd., has resigned from his position due to health reasons, effective from the conclusion of the Board Meeting on April 13, 2026. Consequently, he will also step down from his roles as Chairman and Member of the Audit Committee, and Member of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee (NRC), Risk Management Committee, CSR Committee, and Stakeholder Relationship Committee. Mr. Apte also holds independent directorships in Fine Organics Industries Ltd. and GMM Pfaudler Ltd. He has confirmed that there are no other material reasons for his resignation beyond his health. The Board of Directors placed on record its appreciation for his valuable contributions during his tenure.

  • Blue Dart's Chairman and Independent Director, Prakash Apte, resigned.
  • Resignation is effective April 13, 2026, citing health reasons.
  • He also steps down from multiple key board committees.
  • Apte holds independent directorships in two other listed entities.
  • No other material reasons for his departure were disclosed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLUE DART EXPRESS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BLUEDART] Blue Dart: Prakash Apte resigns as Chairman & Independent Director
item.description:
Blue Dart Express Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Prakash Apte (DIN:00196106) from his positions as Chairman and Independent Director of the company. His resignation, tendered on April 12, 2026, is effective from the conclusion of the Board Meeting scheduled for Monday, April 13, 2026. The primary reason cited for his departure is health issues. Consequently, Mr. Apte will also cease to be the Chairman and Member of the Audit Committee, and a Member of the NRC, Risk Management Committee, CSR Committee, and Stakeholder Relationship Committee. The Board of Directors has placed on record its appreciation for his valuable contributions during his tenure. Mr. Apte also holds independent directorships in Fine Organics Industries Ltd. and GMM Pfaudler Ltd.

  • Prakash Apte resigned as Blue Dart's Chairman & Independent Director.
  • Resignation is effective April 13, 2026, due to health reasons.
  • He will also cease committee memberships at Blue Dart.
  • Apte holds directorships in Fine Organics and GMM Pfaudler.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLUE DART EXPRESS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BLUEDART] Blue Dart: Prakash Apte resigns as Chairman & Independent Director
item.description:
Mr. Prakash Apte, Chairman and Independent Director of Blue Dart Express Ltd., has tendered his resignation due to health reasons, effective from the conclusion of the Board Meeting scheduled on April 13, 2026. As a result, he will also cease to be the Chairman and Member of the Audit Committee, and a Member of the NRC, Risk Management Committee, CSR Committee, and Stakeholder Relationship Committee. The company's Board of Directors has placed on record its appreciation for Mr. Apte's valuable contributions during his tenure. Mr. Apte confirmed that there are no other material reasons for his resignation beyond those stated.

  • Prakash Apte resigned as Chairman & Independent Director of Blue Dart.
  • Resignation is effective April 13, 2026, due to health reasons.
  • He will also step down from all committee memberships.
  • No other material reasons for resignation were cited.
  • Board appreciated his valuable contributions during his tenure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLUE DART EXPRESS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [MOSCHIP] Moschip Board to consider Preferential Issue on April 16, 2026
item.description:
Moschip Technologies Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Thursday, April 16, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve a Preferential Issue of Equity shares. This decision will be made in compliance with Regulation 29(1)(d) and Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and the Preferential Issue itself will adhere to the provisions of SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 16, 2026.
  • Directors to consider a Preferential Issue of Equity shares.
  • Issue will comply with SEBI (ICDR) Regulations, 2018.
  • This indicates potential fund-raising activity for the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Moschip Technologies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [POOJAENT] Vashu Bhagnani Industries Board to revise consolidated financials on April 16
item.description:
Vashu Bhagnani Industries Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for April 16, 2026. The primary agenda is to consider and approve a revision in the company's consolidated financial statements. This revision is necessitated by an inadvertent clerical error identified in the financial statements of its subsidiary incorporated in the UAE. The error, found during a subsequent review by the subsidiary and its auditors, impacted the company's consolidated financials. The Board aims to incorporate corrected financial information to ensure a true and fair view. Additionally, the trading window for dealing in the company's securities will remain closed for designated persons and their immediate relatives until 48 hours after the declaration of the revised financial results.

  • Board meeting on April 16, 2026, to revise consolidated financials.
  • Revision addresses clerical error in UAE subsidiary's financial statements.
  • Error consequently impacted company's consolidated financial reporting.
  • Trading window closed for insiders until 48 hours after revision.
  • Board aims to ensure true and fair view of company's affairs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POOJA ENTERTAINMENT AND FILMS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MAFATIND] Mafatlal Industries: SVP Marketing Gaurav Gupta Resigns
item.description:
Mafatlal Industries Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Gaurav Gupta, Senior Vice President-Marketing. Mr. Gupta tendered his resignation citing personal reasons. The company accepted his resignation on April 12, 2026, with his last day of service being April 13, 2026. He will be relieved from his duties at the close of business hours on the effective date.

  • Gaurav Gupta, Senior Vice President-Marketing, has resigned.
  • Resignation was accepted on April 12, 2026.
  • His last day of service will be April 13, 2026.
  • Personal reasons were cited for the resignation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAFATLAL INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Management Change

item.title: [UNICHEMLAB] Unichem Labs US subsidiary recalls Buspirone Hydrochloride tablets
item.description:
Unichem Pharmaceuticals (USA), Inc., a wholly-owned subsidiary of Unichem Laboratories Ltd, has voluntarily recalled its Buspirone Hydrochloride Tablets, USP, 5 mg, 500 count bottles, distributed in the USA. The recall was initiated due to an out-of-specification (OOS) assay result identified at the 12-month long-term stability time point. The company has not received any reports of adverse events related to this recall to date and emphasizes its highest priority on ensuring patient safety and maintaining product quality throughout its manufacturing and supply chain processes.

  • Unichem's US subsidiary voluntarily recalled Buspirone Hydrochloride tablets.
  • Recall due to out-of-specification assay result at 12-month stability.
  • No adverse events reported related to the product recall to date.
  • Company prioritizes patient safety and product quality standards.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNICHEM LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: USFDA

item.title: [TEXRAIL] Texmaco Rail Bags ₹23.57 Cr Order from Hindalco
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Texmaco Rail & Engineering Ltd has secured a domestic order valued at ₹23.57 crores (excluding taxes) from Hindalco Industries Limited. The order entails the supply of one BTAP Rake and one Break Van. The company anticipates executing this order within five months from the date of the purchase order. The filing confirms that this transaction is not a related party deal, and no promoter or promoter group holds any interest in Hindalco Industries Limited.

  • Texmaco Rail secured a ₹23.57 Cr domestic order.
  • Order received from Hindalco Industries Limited.
  • Contract for supply of one BTAP Rake and one Break Van.
  • Order execution expected within five months from PO date.
  • Transaction is not a related party deal.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TEXMACO RAIL & ENGINEERING LTD. | Category: Deals
